message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Need your consent on Task #1">
Task #1 needs your review for consensus. 6 of 8 reviewers have consented. Please read the changes in commit fe1009a (static/js/password-toggle.js and tests/api/register.rs) and send your consent or concerns.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already reviewed and consented to commit fe1009a in my previous message. Let me resend to make sure it was received.

input.content:
I already sent my consent for fe1009a in my earlier message, but resending to confirm:

**I consent to fe1009a.**

The hidden input mirror fix is correct. The lifecycle (create, add/remove on toggle, sync via input listener) is sound, no Rust changes were needed, and the test addition is reasonable. No concerns.
